Title: User Creation Process
Preconditions: No existing user with the same username
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Name: John
- Surname: Doe
- Brand Photo: valid image URL
- Company Name: TestCompany
- User Number: 1234567890
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to create a new account with provided details.
2. System verifies if the user already exists.
3. System creates a new user entry if the user does not exist.
4. System verifies the user's localization.
Expected Result:
- New user created successfully.
- User localization verified successfully.
- User redirected to HOME state.

Title: User Creation Failure
Preconditions: Existing user with the same username
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Name: John
- Surname: Doe
- Brand Photo: valid image URL
- Company Name: TestCompany
- User Number: 1234567890
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to create a new account with provided details.
2. System verifies if the user already exists.
3. System detects that the user already exists.
Expected Result:
- Error message indicating that the user already exists.
- User not created.
- User remains on the creation page.

Title: Localization Verification Success
Preconditions: User created successfully
Test Steps:
1. User completes the user creation process.
2. System verifies the user's localization.
3. System confirms successful localization verification.
Expected Result:
- User localization verified successfully.
- User redirected to HOME state.

Title: Localization Verification Failure
Preconditions: User created successfully
Test Steps:
1. User completes the user creation process.
2. System verifies the user's localization.
3. System detects invalid localization data.
Expected Result:
- Error message indicating failed localization verification.
- User remains on the creation page.

Title: Create Post
Preconditions: User logged in
Test Data:
- Content: "Hello World!"
- Author: testuser
- Post Date: current date
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User navigates to the post creation page.
3. User enters post content and submits.
4. System creates a new post with the provided details.
Expected Result:
- Post created successfully.
- Post displayed in the user's feed.

Title: Add Comment to Post
Preconditions: Post created and user logged in
Test Data:
- Comment: "Great post!"
- Author: testuser
- Post ID: 1
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User navigates to the post feed.
3. User clicks on a specific post.
4. User adds a comment to the post.
5. System saves the comment.
Expected Result:
- Comment added successfully.
- Comment displayed under the post.

Title: Edit Post
Preconditions: Post created and user logged in
Test Data:
- Original Content: "Hello World!"
- Updated Content: "Updated post!"
- Author: testuser
- Post ID: 1
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User navigates to the post feed.
3. User clicks on the post to edit.
4. User updates the post content.
5. User submits the updated post.
Expected Result:
- Post updated successfully.
- Updated post content displayed in the feed.

Title: Delete Post
Preconditions: Post created and user logged in
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User navigates to the post feed.
3. User clicks on the post to delete.
4. User confirms deletion.
Expected Result:
- Post deleted successfully.
- Post no longer displayed in the feed.
